title: Chapter 2393: I Just Want to Talk
content:
Chapter 2393: I Just Want to Talk

"How dare you address this majestic one with such foul language!" The Primal Sovereign of the Seas exclaimed with disbelief after hearing the True Emperor of the Seas’ curse at it.

"I have a name, you know? I am the Primal Sovereign of the Seas—the true Ruler of the Seas, you imposter!"

"I know who the hell you are! Every sea creature in this world is aware of you! What I don’t know is why the hell you’re chasing after me!" The True Emperor of the Seas shouted, panic in its voice.

"Why are you running? I just want to talk," the Primal Sovereign of the Seas said in a calm voice, trying to convince it to stop.

"Do you think I am stupid or something?! There’s no way in hell you’re only here to talk when you’re chasing after me so vigorously! If you really want to talk, we can talk like this!"

Unsurprisingly, the True Emperor of the Seas did not fall for such an obvious trick.

"You’re only making this more difficult for yourself later with all this running around."

"What are you talking about?!"

"Stop for a moment, and I’ll tell you everything."

"Seriously, you can stop that nonsense! I am not going to stop running until you leave!"

"I guess we’ll have to do this the hard way..." The Primal Sovereign of the Seas sighed out loud as it casually chased after the True Emperor of the Seas.

Of course, if it truly wanted to catch up, the Primal Sovereign of the Seas could easily do so. However, it wanted to toy with the True Emperor of the Seas for some time before doing so. This also allowed Yuan some more time to prepare for the battle.

The True Emperor of the Seas quickly realized that it was being toyed with and shouted in desperation, "Don’t you know who’s behind me?! If you kill me, you’ll definitely be killed, too!"

"Of course, I am aware of your master. That’s why I haven’t touched you for so long despite my desire to."

"Then why the hell are you trying to kill me now?!"

"Who said I am trying to kill you? I just want to talk."

"We’re talking right now!"

"No, this is something that we can only discuss while motionless."

"That’s utter bullshit!"

"Truly, I just want to talk."

The Primal Sovereign of the Seas remained insistent that it merely wanted to talk, but the True Emperor of the Seas was having none of it and continued fleeing as if its life depended on it.

Over the course of the next week, the Primal Sovereign of the Seas relentlessly pursued the True Emperor of the Seas, chasing it across hundreds of seas and oceans throughout every realm within the Nine Heavens.

"Oh, right. A day in this world is a year in that world..." The Primal Sovereign of the Seas suddenly recalled this important detail after a week of chasing.

"I am a bit reluctant to end something this entertaining, but alas... consider yourself lucky that I hadn’t thought of doing this earlier, as I could easily do this for thousands of years without getting bored."

"What are you going to do to me?!" The True Emperor of the Seas cried out in terror when it noticed its pursuer increasing in speed and gradually catching up to it.

"I just want to talk." The Primal Sovereign of the Seas kept to his original joke.

Eventually, the True Emperor of the Seas reached its limit.

It came to an abrupt halt and turned to face its pursuer after having already realized it could not outrun the Primal Sovereign of the Seas, leaving it no choice but to fight.

"Eat this, you fat fuck!"

The True Emperor of the Seas lashed out in desperation, unleashing a devastating attack that consumed half of its energy in the blink of an eye.

Yet the Primal Sovereign of the Seas did not so much as flinch. Instead, it merely laughed, its mocking voice echoing through the depths, "What a waste of energy! You’ll regret exhausting yourself soon!"

Then it confronted the attack, opening its mouth to devour it.

"What?!" The True Emperor of the Seas exclaimed in shock, its eyes widening as its attack was so effortlessly deflected.

It had always known the Primal Sovereign of the Seas was overwhelmingly powerful, but it had never imagined the gap between them would be this vast, almost like comparing a small lake to the boundless ocean.

After swallowing the attack, the Primal Sovereign of the Seas’ round figure vanished for a split second before reappearing directly before the True Emperor of the Seas.

Then, without hesitation, it opened its massive jaws and bit down. Yet it neither devoured nor harmed it. Instead, it simply held the True Emperor of the Seas in its mouth, as though a cat had caught its prey and was toying with it.

The next moment, the Primal Sovereign of the Seas activated its ability and disappeared from the Nine Heavens.

Meanwhile, Yuan had been waiting for the Primal Sovereign of the Seas’ return for seven years straight, and he was beginning to wonder if something had gone wrong or if it had simply forgotten.

Just as Yuan lowered his gaze to the crimson sea and let out a deep sigh, he noticed the surface begin to bulge once more, but this time, it swelled far larger than before.

A second later, the Primal Sovereign of the Seas emerged from the crimson sea with a familiar-looking being in its mouth.

’No way! He actually dragged it here!’ Yuan cried inwardly after seeing the True Emperor of the Seas.

"He’s all yours!" The Sovereign of the Seas said to Yuan before spitting the True Emperor of the Seas out.

Without hesitation, Yuan activated Absolute Dragon Awakening and summoned Number One Under Heaven, even using Chaotic Essence and Eternal Essence before striking at the True Emperor of the Seas as it fell from the sky—its mind still in utter disbelief and confusion.

"WHAT THE FUCK IS GOING ON?!" It cried out loud as Yuan cut through its tentacles like tofu.
